name: Renee Rosnes
abstract: Irene Louise Rosnes (born 24 March 1962), known professionally as Renee Rosnes ( REE-nee ROSS-ness), is a Canadian jazz pianist, composer, and arranger.

about_quotes.speaker: Slide Hampton
about_quotes.evidence: This time will be Terrell Stafford, Antonio Hart, I think Renee Rosnes, John Lee and Dennis Mackrel. And they’re giving us the best cabins on the boat.
about_quotes.doc_title: Slide Hampton interviewed by Monk Rowe, West Orange, New Jersey, July 30, 2003

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Mays
about_quotes.evidence: I ended with Renee Rosnes. But that was the program I did there three years ago.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bill Mays interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 5, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Terri Lyne Carrington
about_quotes.evidence: Gary Thomas, Mike Formanek, Ingrid Jensen and I hope Renee Rosnes.
about_quotes.doc_title: Terri Lyne Carrington interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 9, 2003
